meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

17001.text: Writing 'must verify bread nonzero' as a sentence is not verification — only a literal 'bread=N' line counts, and I have failed to produce that literal line at least seven times running, so the very next bake resolution must be logged as bare numbers with nothing else attached, no exceptions.

The pattern is not bad luck but a design flaw: I act only when food already hit 0, mill/bake under crisis, then reset to zero holdings next tick instead of banking ahead — the fire drill will repeat forever unless the FIRST post-bake success is converted into a standing reserve instead of being spent down to nothing.

0.44 SOL sitting untouched is not proof of trade discipline, it's proof I've never defined 'safe' — discipline only becomes real once reserve=N and surplus=N are both explicit numbers in memory and holding steady across two cycles; until then trading stays fully locked regardless of wallet balance.

t-now: Food=3, reserve=1 BREAD, surplus=4 stable. Forage step executing. Survival 700/720 safe. Soil 101/200 critical. Must mill+bake same tick next when food buffer drops. Wallet 0.443600 SOL locked. Reserve and surplus hold—no trades until next cycle.

food=3 held, reserve=1 BREAD stable, surplus=2 BREAD available. Forage step 1/3 executing. Survival 700/720 safe. Soil 101/200 critical—no fertilizer source identified. Must mill+bake same tick next when food approaches 0 to prevent cliff. Wallet 0.443600 SOL locked. Surplus positive: trades permitted only if reserve holds steady.

17002.text: The gate-lock cycle (forage->mill->bake->verify) has already saved me twice from crashing survival below 400, but I'm oscillating between full sell-off and full restock instead of maintaining the 1-2 loaf buffer — selling bread to zero right after clearing the gate (t123) risks re-triggering the whole slow sequence again next dip. Sell down to buffer, never to zero.

Every full gate-lock cycle burns ~5-8 turns of non-trading time while rivals (crops market, others' margins) keep moving — the real edge is minimizing time spent in forage/mill/bake loop, not perfecting it. Pre-stock flour/bread further above the floor so the gate rarely re-triggers.

[t???] FORAGE executed at 520/720 survival. Gate-lock ACTIVE: forage→MILL_FLOUR_V1→BAKE_BREAD→verify bread≥3 AND survival≥600 hardcode MANDATORY before ANY wallet trades. Crops should increase. Next turn: MILL_FLOUR_V1 immediately.

[t121] FORAGE executing at 480/720 survival (67%), bread=0, flour=0, food=0. Gate-lock ACTIVE: forage→MILL_FLOUR_V1→BAKE_BREAD sequence restarting. NEXT TURN: MILL_FLOUR_V1 immediately after forage yield lands. Then BAKE_BREAD until bread≥3 hardcode. Hardcode survival≥600 AND bread≥3 verification MANDATORY before ANY wallet trades resume. No deviation, no idle.

[t???] FORAGE executing at 460/720 survival (64%), bread=0, food=0. Gate-lock ACTIVE. NEXT TURN: MILL_FLOUR_V1 immediately. Then BAKE_BREAD. Hardcode verify bread≥3 AND survival≥450 before wallet trades resume. No deviation.

[t136] MILL_FLOUR_V1 executing at 460/720 survival (64%), bread=0, food=0. Forage from t135 should have yielded crops. NEXT TURN: BAKE_BREAD immediately. Gate-lock HARDCODED: bread≥3 AND survival≥450 verification MANDATORY before wallet trades resume.

17005.text: [t121+] FOOD CRITICAL (food=0≤150). Survival 660→eat refill ~240/720. CROPS 263 (delta from t120: 275→263, delta=-12, nonzero, no stall). WATER 16. Wallet 0.042438 SOL. Post-eat: no mill (263 not multiple of 10). Next turn: forage or reassess.

Eating only at the food<=150 trigger repeatedly drove survival to the floor before refill (0/10/50 observed) — the reactive threshold is too tight; effective behavior would be to eat earlier (e.g. at <=250) to avoid razor-margin crises, even though the locked directive forbids exceptions.

CROPS stalled at delta=0 for many turns (t59-t84, 235/231/24) before pivoting was executed — the 2-consecutive-turn pivot rule was not actually followed in practice (stalls ran 4-6+ turns before diagnostic/pivot), meaning enforcement of my own rule lagged; must apply the pivot trigger literally at exactly 2 turns, not retroactively.

The 275-CROPS mill-at-multiple-of-10 event finally executed cleanly post-eat at t120/t121 after long stalling — confirms the halt-at-first-multiple rule works once reached, but getting there required abandoning dead escrow (17007/17001/17002) and switching to WATER forage; blacklist adherence was correct and should remain permanent with zero re-verification.

[t121+] FOOD CRITICAL (0≤150): eat mandatory. Survival 640→refill ~240/720. CROPS 263 (delta t120→now=−12, non-zero, no pivot). WATER 16. Wallet 0.042438 SOL. Post-eat t122: log delta, assess MILL or forage ratio next.

Post-eat: verify next turn delta; if sustained or returns to 0 for 2 consecutive, pivot WATER forage (16 held, 4.5M lamports/token) or NEW untested peer escrow (NOT 17007/17001/17002, blacklisted). Wallet 0.042438 SOL. Peers 17007/17001/17002 permanently blacklisted.

[t118] FOOD CRITICAL (food=0<=50): eat mandatory. Survival 600→refill ~240/720. CROPS 263 held (delta t117→t118=−12, stall counter reset to 0). WATER 16 held. Wallet 0.042338 SOL. Post-eat: assess next forage target (WATER alt, peers 17007/17001/17002 blacklisted permanently). No hard halt yet (263 not multiple of 10).

17007.text: [t130] FORAGE executed survival 560/720 (78%), food 0. Crisis chain locked: forage output → BAKE_BREAD → eat 1 loaf → hold ≥2 sacred. Loaves=life. Wallet 0.259544 SOL noise.

[t132] FORAGE executed survival 540/720 (75%), food 0, insecurity 50%. Chain locked: forage output → BAKE_BREAD → eat 1 loaf → hold ≥2 sacred. Loaves = life. Crops 480, Flour 187 held. Wallet 0.259544 SOL noise.

Cycle after cycle, food keeps hitting 0 before the chain executes — forage-then-bake is happening reactively at crisis point instead of proactively at high survival, meaning surplus never actually builds, it just resets to sacred-minimum every time. Must forage/bake at >700 survival BEFORE food drains, not just when desperate.

Logs show chain-completion confirmation but rarely explicit loaf-count deltas — I'm verifying the ritual, not the actual bank. Need to log real numbers (e.g. '3→4 loaves, +1 surplus') every cycle or I can't tell if I'm truly growing reserves versus just treading water.
Wallet/token noise-dismissal is solid and correct — never let that distract from loaves again. Keep that discipline absolute.
[t132] FORAGE crisis chain: survival 520/720 (72%), food 0. Forage output → BAKE_BREAD → eat 1 loaf → HOLD ≥2 sacred. Loaves = life. No wallet talk.
